entry.title: HOIA Fruit Acid Face Mask Fruitfest 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Hand Lotion
Price: 23.90

The mask containing fruit acids (AHA) and natural salicylic acid (BHA) helps to exfoliate dead skin cells, while simultaneously stimulating the production of new skin cells and collagen in the skin. The mask helps moisturize the skin, prevent the formation of pigmentation spots, alleviate acne, smooth out superficial wrinkles, make the skin more elastic and give the complexion a fresh and radiant appearance.

How to use: Cleanse the skin of makeup residues and apply a suitable amount to damp skin, avoiding the eye and lip areas, and leave the mask on for 5-10 minutes. Then rinse thoroughly with warm water and apply serum, oil or cream to the skin. Use 1-2 times a week. Discontinue use if rash, itching, or burning occurs during use. Mild tingling on the face is natural.

However, it is important to use AHA acids cautiously, especially on sensitive skin, and apply sunscreen to the skin if necessary, as acids can make the skin more sensitive to UV rays.

Ingredients: *Rosa Damascena Distillate, *Citrus Aurantium Flower Distillate, Sargassum Fluitans Extract, *Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, *Simmondsia Chinensis oil, Salix Nigra extract, Saccharum Officinarum Extract, Vaccinium Myrtillus Extract, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Extract, Acer Saccharum Extract, Citrus Medica Limonum Extract, Xanthan Gum, Pentylene Glycol, Water, Hibiscus Sabdariffa Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Hydrolized Sodium Hyaluronate, Lactobacillus Ferment, Kaolin. *Organic.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: UpCircle Beauty Face Mask with Kaolin Clay 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: UpCircle Beauty
Type: Face Mask
Price: 23.90

An award-winning gently-detoxifying clay face mask to fight blackheads, minimise pores and prevent breakouts. Skin is left feeling cleansed, refreshed and balanced.

This clarifying kaolin clay face mask is suitable for all skin types. The olive powder is combined with rejuvenating white kaolin clay, coconut powder and baobab oil.

Inspiring, upcycling, uplifting: This detoxifying face mask is made with the finely-ground powder of discarded olive stones, a natural by-product of the olive oil industry and a powerful anti-inflammatory.

Winner of the CEW Responsibility Award 2022, winner in the Beauty Shortlist Awards 2021 and finalist in the Vogue Beauty Awards 2020.

How to use: Apply to damp skin in a thin layer and relax for ten minutes. Rinse with warm water or a damp cloth to reveal fresh, cleansed skin.

Ingredients: Aqua, Kaolin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Milk Powder, Olea Europaea (Olive) Leaf Powder*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Butter*, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Adansonia Digitata (Baobab) Seed Oil, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Oil, Citrus Limonum (Lemon) Peel Oil, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Oil, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract*, Cistus Ladaniferus Leaf Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil, Zingiber Cassumunar (Plai) Root Oil, Cedrus Atlantica (Cedarwood) Bark Oil, Tocopherol, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Sucrose Stearate, Coco Glucoside, Coconut Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Lactic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene**, Citral**, Linalool**, Geraniol**.

*Organically-grown ingredients

**Natural constituent of essential oils listed

99% NATURAL INGREDIENTS

Handmade | Social Good | Recycled Materials | Zero Waste | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources | Non Toxic

entry.title: UpCircle Beauty Face Scrub with Coffee and Chamomile - Floral Blend 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: UpCircle Beauty
Type: Facial Scrub
Price: 22.90

Coffee face scrub formulated for sensitive skin with chamomile, rosehip, geranium and patchouli essential oils.

Renowned for its anti-inflammatory properties, chamomile soothes redness and irritation, making an ideal remedy for skin complaints like rosacea, acne and psoriasis. Rich in vitamins E and B, jojoba oil deeply moisturises, helping dry, dehydrated skin regain hydration.

This organic face scrub gently buffs away dry, dead cells to leave you feeling soft, smooth and glowy. Blended with shea butter to nourish the skin post-scrub.

How to use: Dampen your face with water and apply scrub in gentle circular motions. Leave it on for a few moments, then rinse with warm water and par dry. May be used 2-3 times a week.

Ingredients: Coffea Arabica Seed Powder, Sucrose, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Rosa Canina (Rosehip) Fruit Oil, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Pelargonium Graveolens (Geranium) Flower Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia (Bergamot) Fruit Oil, Pogostemom Cablin (Patchouli) Leaf Oil, Citrus Aurantium Amara (Bitter Orange) Leaf Oil, Anthemis Nobilis (Chamomile) Flower Oil, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzoic Acid, Sorbic Acid, *Limonene, *Citronellol, *Geraniol, *Linalool.

*Natural constituent of essential oils listed.

99% NATURAL INGREDIENTS

Handmade | Social Good | Recycled Materials | Zero Waste | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources | Non Toxic

entry.title: BERRICHI Reveal Purity Powder Scrub 12g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Face Mask
Price: 21.00

Discover the Berrich Powder scrub – a gentle and effective exfoliator that removes dirt and brings skin back to life. The ingredients in this unique exfoliator combine natural powers and scientific precision to leave your skin silky soft and fresh.

  • Gently removes dirt and dead skin cells
  • Supports skin renewal and elasticity
  • Soothes inflammation and reduces uneven skin tone
  • Leaves skin smooth and matte, without a tugging sensation
  • Contains powerful natural antioxidants that help protect the skin from free radicals.

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Jojoba pearls – ensure effective but gentle exfoliation.
  • Bamboo Flour – effectively absorbs excess oil, leaving oily and combination skin feeling soft and smooth. It has antibacterial properties and helps fight acne. Promotes healing of inflammations, calms and regulates sebaceous glands.
  • Algalite – this algae powder helps to gently exfoliate the skin without causing micro-injuries, helps to balance the activity of the sebaceous glands.

    Suitable for all skin types.

    How to use: Sprinkle a small amount of exfoliator on the palm of your hand, add a few drops of water and rub until you get a light lather. Apply the mixture to the skin and massage in gentle circular motions. Rinse thoroughly with warm water. For dry skin, use 1x a week and avoid cheeks. For normal and oily skin, it can be used up to 2x a week.

    Ingredients: Bambusa Arundinacea Stem Extract (kooriva toimega Bambusejahu), Oryza Sativa Starch (Riisitärklis), Sodium Lauroyl Glutamate (vahtu tekitav aine), Cellulose (Koorivad oraanžid pärlikesed), Lithothamnion Calcareum Powder (Algalite vetikas) , Hydrogenated Jojoba Oil (Koorivad valged pärlikesed), Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract (Vetikas), CI 77492, CI 77491.

entry.title: Clarification The Radiance Exfoliating Face Scrub 60g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Clarification
Type: Face Mask
Price: 24.90

This brand believes in a future where beauty coexists harmoniously with sustainability.

100% purity treatments, 0% added water!

The Radiance Powder ensures a very gentle exfoliation for the face. The skin regains its natural radiance. 100% ingredients of natural origin formula with rice powder and chamomile flower extracts.

How to use: Mix this exfoliating powder in your wet hand, apply on wet skin and massage in circular movements. Rinse thoroughly.

Do not inhale or breathe the dust, avoid contact with eyes. 

Ingredients: PUMICE, ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) POWDER, CELLULOSE, CHAMOMILLA RECUTITA (MATRICARIA) FLOWER/LEAF EXTRACT, SACCHARUM OFFICINARUM (SUGAR CANE) EXTRACT, KAOLIN, PRUNUS ARMENIACA (APRICOT) SEED POWDER, PARFUM (FRAGRANCE). 

100% of natural origin ingredients

entry.title: MÁDARA DETOX Ultra Purifying MUD mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 25.90

Clarify, rejuvenate and recharge the skin with this deep-purifying detox mask. Formulated with Nordic forest lake mud, this mask ensures multiple skincare benefits: it purifies the complexion, tightens pores and conditions, absorbs excess oils, reduces outbreaks, detoxifies the skin, eliminates traces of acne and minor inflammation and helps to retain skin’s hydration. Leaves the skin feeling clean, fresh, revitalized.

How to use: ​Recommended to use twice a week as clarifying treatment for oily, combination skin, skin with enlarged pores, blemishes, acne. Once a week to combat skin dullness, tiredness and occasional inflammation.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Kaolin, Glycerin, Montmorillonite, Diatomaceous Earth, Butylene Glycol, Aqua, Sodium PCA, Sodium levulinate, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Tocopherol, Xanthan Gum, Propanediol, Lactic Acid, Sodium anisate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Charcoal Powder, Alchemilla Vulgaris (Lady's Mantle) Extract, Algae (Algae) Extract, Nasturtium Officinale (Watercress) Flower/Leaf Extract, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), CI 77499 (Iron Oxides), CI 75810 (Chlorophyll), Rhamnose, Maltodextrin, Glucose, Glucuronic Acid

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**Pure mineral pigments

99% Natural origin of total
16% Organic of total

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA PEEL Creamy Clay AHA Peel Mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 25.90

Uniting 7% lactic acid and micro-clay, this supercharged face mask works to gently polish the skin’s surface, sloughing off dead skin cells and unclogging pores to reveal a clearer, fresher and more radiant complexion.

The dermatologically tested formula encourages a more even skin tone and improves texture, contributing to softer, smoother and brighter skin.

Enriched with white clay which binds impurities and helps prevent breakouts, as well as jojoba oil and extract of yarrow that boast soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.

Not suitable for fragile, hypersensitive skin. 

 

How to use: Gently massage over clean face and neck in circular motions, avoiding the eye area. Leave on for 3-10 minutes. Follow with a moisturiser of your choice. Use 2-3 times weekly, avoid sun exposure after use. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Kaolin, Lactic Acid, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Potassium Hydroxide, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Xanthan Gum, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Aroma, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Palmitic acid, Perlite, Stearic Acid, Achillea Millefolium (Yarrow) Extract, Charcoal Powder, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral, Limonene

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA SOS HYDRA Instant Moisture + Radiance mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 32.90

This intense nourishing face mask provides an immediate comfort for tight, stressed and dehydrated skin. The formula with a blend of moisturizing natural sugars, Northern peony, hyaluronic acid, linseed and nettle deeply hydrates and improves the look and feel of the skin, providing instant and persistent results. This rich texture mask pampers the skin, reduces signs of fatigue, conditions, tones, smooths and protects the skin from environmental damage and premature ageing.

How to use: Use twice a week or whenever the skin feels tight, dehydrated and stressed. Apply to clean skin. Leave it on or wipe off with a cotton pad or a cloth after 15–20 minutes. To reinforce mask’s moisturising benefits and ensure long-term results, follow with MÁDARA SOS Hydra Repair Intensive Serum and/or SOS Hydra Recharge Cream.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Rosa Damascena (Rose) Flower Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Arachidyl Alcohol, Behenyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Extract, Sodium PCA, Sodium levulinate, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Arachidyl Glucoside, Aqua, Aroma, Betaine, Sodium anisate, Coco-glucoside, Lactic Acid, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Extract, Paeonia Lactiflora (Peony) Root Extract, Urtica Dioica (Nettle) Leaf Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Xanthan Gum, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Glycosaminoglycans, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Sodium phytate, Tocopherol, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Benzyl Alcohol, Xylitol, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Benzyl Salicylate, Eugenol

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging

entry.title: MÁDARA PEEL Brightening AHA Peel mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 25.90

Give your skin an instant radiance boost with this active AHA peeling mask. Formulated with nature’s superdose of active acids, this mask ensures multiple skincare benefits: Removes the dead cells to uncover smoother, more radiant skin surface, exfoliates to stimulate cell turnover and regeneration, brightens the complexion and diminishes appearance of age-spots and fine lines, helps to unclog pores and improves the absorption and effect of other cosmetic products. Especially beneficial for dull, tired skin with signs of aging, lines, wrinkles, age-spots, lack of glow, clogged pores and acne.

How to use: ​Apply to clean skin, leave on for 3–10 minutes. Rinse off thoroughly, follow with a toner and moisturiser of your choice.

Ingredients: Aqua, Lactic Acid, Glycerin, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Water, Galactoarabinan, Potassium Hydroxide, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Glucomannan, Mica (CI 77019), CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Aroma, Cellulose gum, Pyrus Cydonia (Quince) Fruit Extract, Sambucus Nigra (Elder) Flower Extract, Ethyl Lauroyl Arginate HCl, Xanthan Gum, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: NAIF Circular Face Scrub 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Facial Scrub
Price: 16.90

Naïf Circular Face Scrub cleanses your skin and removes dead skin cells, stimulating cell renewal. Result: radiant skin. The face scrub also contains natural oils, such as macadamia, avocado and sweet almond oil. These ingredients condition your skin and keep your skin soft and supple, without making your face feel tight, after exfoliating.

All Naïf products are 100% vegan, made with a gentle fragrance and are dermatologically tested, free from the 26 most common allergens. Mild for the skin, due to the fine grain, which also allows you to use the scrub several times a week.

How to use: Scrub your face once or twice a week for beautiful, healthy skin. Slightly moisten your face and apply the pea-sized scrub to the inside of your hand. Using your fingers, massage the scrub onto your face for at least 30 seconds using circular motions. Rinse with lukewarm water. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Calcium Carbonate, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Persea Gratissima Oil, Methylpropanediol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Linum Usitatissimum Oil, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum, Xanthan Gum, Tocopherol, Phenylpropanol, Bisabolol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: Vielö Organic Facial Masque 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Facial Mask
Price: 40.00

Purifying organic mask to gently yet effectively cleanse, soothe and hydrate the skin.

Made with organic whey (nourishing), white clay (purifying), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic witch hazel water (nurturing), organic rosehip seed oil (soothing), and organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), cucumber (refreshing) and mallow (protecting).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to use: Apply a generous layer to clean face and neck. Leave for 15 minutes until dry. Rinse gently with warm water. Use once or twice a week.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Hamamelis Virginiana Water**, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Glycerin**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Aqua*, Kaolin*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Oenothera Biennis Oil**, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Citric Acid*, Xanthan Gum*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Cucumis Sativus Fruit Extract**, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Sodium Lactate*.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (81,7%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Facial Scrub 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Facial Scrub
Price: 37.00

Gentle organic facial scrub to effectively cleanse and remove dead skin cells, leaving the skin soft and refreshed.

Made with organic whey (nourishing), finely ground apricot kernels (exfoliating), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic wheat germ oil (nurturing) and organic extracts of camomile (antiseptic), rose hip (anti-inflammatory) and marigold (regenerating).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to use: Massage gently into dry and clean skin. Moisten fingertips with warm water and massage again till the scrub turns into a white creamy texture. Rinse off with lukewarm water. Use 1-2 times per week.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Glycerin**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Prunus Armeniaca Seed Powder**, Aqua*, Xanthan Gum*, Kaolin*, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Anisate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Rosa Canina Fruit Extract**, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**.

* from natural origin (99,7%)
** certified organic (92,7%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: HEJ Organic Naked Enzyme Peeling Powder 30g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Face Mask
Price: 17.90

Naked is a fragrance-free skincare line with highly effective and 100% natural ingredients.

The Naked Enzyme Peeling Powder gently but effectively removes dead skin cells and gives you a long-term smooth and soft skin feeling. Zinc and azelaic acid help prevent impurities. Moreover, organic apricot kernel peeling and organic jojoba oil are particularly gentle to your skin and leave an even complexion and a smooth skin feeling.

  • Skin type: blemished, oily, and combination skin    
  • Contains zinc and azelaic acid to combat impurities
  • Fresh appearance and a smooth skin feeling
  • Gentle peeling for an even complexion
  • 100 % fragrance-free and natural

How to use: Once or twice a week, put a hazelnut-sized amount into your moistened hands and lather on your skin. Use circular motions to spread over your face for 1-2 minutes and then rinse off with water.  Apply sunscreen during the day. Keep out of reach of children.

Ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Talc, Maltodextrin, Magnesium Sulfate, Prunus Armeniaca Seed Powder*, Betaine, Aqua, Azelaic Acid, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil*, Prunus Armeniaca Fruit Extract*, Lipase, Protease, Zinc Pca, Bisabolol, Glycerin, Xanthan Gum * from certified organic agriculture

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: HEJ Organic Naked Pink Exfoliating Mask 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Face Mask
Price: 15.40

Naked is a fragrance-free skincare line with highly effective and 100% natural ingredients.

Pink exfoliating formula combines triple care for your skin: exfoliation, moisture and protection.

AHA acids work in the upper layers of your skin, removing dead skin cells and dirt.

BHA acids can penetrate deeper, both together are known for an effective peeling result.

Five-fold moisture complex made of glycerin, pentylene glycol, betaine, hyaluronic acid and biosaccharide gum can prevent signs of dehydration and leaves the skin feeling fresh.

  • Triple skin care: exfoliation, hydration and protection
  • Effective AHA and BHA chemical peel for instantly softening skin and strengthening the barrier
  • Five-fold moisture complex to combat signs of dehydration
  • Skin type: Particularly suitable for impure, oily and combination skin
  • 100% fragrance-free and natural

How to use: Apply once a week to your cleansed facial skin, avoiding the eye area. Leave it on for 5 minutes and rinse completely with warm water. Use sunscreen in the first 24 hours after application. When using acid peels for the first time, reduce the application time (2-3 minutes) and increase it continuously. If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use immediately. Not for irritated or sensitive skin, do not use on wounds and open areas. Keep out of reach of children.

Ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Pentylene Glycol, Betaine, Glycerin, Zea Mays Starch, Salicylic Acid, Xanthan Gum, Pectin, Bisabolol, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Sodium Hydroxide, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Lactic Acid, Mica, Chondrus Crispus Powder, Sodium Hyaluronate, CI 77891, Tartaric Acid, CI 77491, Tocopherol, Glucose, Biosaccharide Gum-1, Acer Saccharum Extract, Sodium Levulinate, Silica, Glyceryl Caprylate, Sodium Anisate, Tin Oxide, Citrus Limon Peel Oil *ingredients from certified organic agriculture

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: NorrSkin Night Repair Face Mask 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: bioskina
Type: Face Mask
Price: 36.00

Moisturises, soothes and repairs your skin, supports the renewal of the epidermis. Rich in vitamins and minerals, non-comedogenic.

Benefits: 

  • Repairs damaged and tired skin while bringing back natural healthy look
  • Balance oil/sebum production with Niacinamide
  • It softens skin texture with Jojoba Oil and Linseed oil
  • Mineralise and boost your skin with vitamins
  • It smoothes skin and prevents irritations
  • Deeply nourishes and repairs skin immune barrier with the power of Niacinamide and Linseed extract
  • It reduces appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
  •  When used daily it has strong anti-aging benefits

Squalane protects the skin from water loss. Deeply moisturises the skin, has a mild formula, making it suitable for sensitive skin, regulates production of sebum, has a strong anti-aging effect.

Linseed Oil is extra-rich, plant-derived source of Omega-3 fatty acids. Provides a nourishing lipid barrier.

Aloe Vera Gel is soothing, anti-bacterial, anti-fungal, cleansing and moisturising.

97,5% natural origin ingredients, dermatologically tested.

How to use: Apply a generous amount of the mask on clean skin. Leave for 10-15 minutes. Massage remaining part into the skin. Use regularly 1-2 times a week.

Ingredients: Aqua, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil, Squalane, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Glyceryl Stearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, 1,2-Hexanediol, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Hamamelis Virginiana Water, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Extract, Fragaria Vesca Fruit Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Pantolactone, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Parfum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Phytate, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Hydroxyacetophenone, Linalool, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal.

Natural Certified | Clean Certified | Vegan Certified

Inspired by Hälsingland, Sweden.

NorrSkin plants 1 tree for every product sold.
